## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run format` clean
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` clean
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run snapshot` regenerated (attach at least one PNG below)
- [ ] Edge case covered if applicable (empty, negative, single point, large N)
- [ ] `README.md` capability matrix updated if a new chart or palette
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` Unreleased section updated
